message:
test(readme): cover remaining Resample methods (fd90.281 / br-flgml)

Extends readme_window_operations_compiles_and_runs to cover the 6
remaining Series Resample methods (after fd90.199 + fd90.200 covered
sum/mean/count/min/max/first/last):

- std, var, median, prod (additional reductions)
- apply (Fn(&[Scalar]) -> Scalar over each time-bucket)
- apply_fn (failable Fn(&[Scalar]) -> Result<Scalar, FrameError>)

All 13 Series Resample methods are now exercised.

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
